results.bodyPreview:
{"errors":[{"message":"(sqlite3.IntegrityError) UNIQUE constraint failed: users.username
[SQL: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password) VALUES (?, ?, ?)]
[parameters: ('admin', 'user@example.test', 'test-token')]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/14/gkpj)","locations":[{"line":2,"column":3}],"path":["createUser"]}],"data":{"createUser":null}}
